# Tradecraft Labs — Page Wireframes v1

> ASCII wireframes for homepage and project overview.
> These represent layout hierarchy and content placement, not visual design.
> Produced 2026-06-23 for architecture review.

---

║                                                                       ║
║  SECTION 4 — WHY THIS MATTERS                                         ║
║  ────────────────────────────                                         ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Why This Research Matters                                            ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Existing BISO literature focuses on role definitions, reporting      ║
║  structures, and communication responsibilities. There is limited     ║
║  research examining how BISOs influence organizational decision       ║
║  making, improve governance processes, or affect the quality of       ║
║  risk acceptance decisions. This research addresses that gap.         ║
║                                                                       ║
║  [Drawn from project researchGap field. 3-5 sentences.]              ║
║                                                                       ║

---

## NAVIGATION STRUCTURE SUMMARY

```
Primary Navigation (all pages, in Header):
  TRADECRAFT LABS        → /
  Research               → /research
  Journal                → /journal
  About                  → /about

Secondary Navigation (in-page, contextual):
  /research              → project cards with [View Project →] links
  /research/[project]    → artifacts, [View All Entries →] in journal column
  /journal               → filter by category and project
  /journal/[entry]       → ← Previous Entry  |  Next Entry →
  /research/[project]/artifacts/[artifact] → breadcrumb, related artifacts sidebar

Footer Links (all pages):
  JoeHawley.com  ·  LinkedIn

Not in Primary Nav (accessible via content links):
  /publications          → linked from project pages and artifact pages
  /research/[project]/journal  → linked from project overview journal column
```

---

## MISSION VISIBILITY MAP

```
Location                    Treatment                       Always Visible?
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Header subtitle             1-line truncation               Yes — every page
Homepage Hero               Full statement, large type      On / (homepage only)
Footer                      Full statement                  Yes — every page
About page                  Full statement + expansion      On /about only
OG meta description         Full statement (hidden/SEO)     In link previews
```
